task.original:
Implement ghost piece rendering.

Status: Partial. Task 1 added ghostBlocks state and drawGhostLayer; nothing populates ghostBlocks yet. Blocks validation item "Ghost always matches rest position" in step 8.

File: public/assets/js/board.js

Actions:
- Compute ghost from current falling blocks + locked map: simulate downward movement until next step collides.
- Draw order: 1) background/grid 2) locked blocks 3) ghost (low alpha) 4) active falling piece
- Recompute ghost whenever falling piece/map changes.

Domain decision: Ghost piece rest position = same as hard drop rest position for the active piece.

history.summary: Worktree was created and task context initialized.

Partial implementation: ghostBlocks state + drawGhostLayer exist; nothing populates ghostBlocks yet. Domain: ghost rest = hard-drop rest (game.js hard drop loops canCurrentTetrominoMoveDown then settles). Draft Feature with 3 scenarios (+ at-rest behavior TBD). Awaiting user answers and approval before writing story.md.

Persisted approved Gherkin story (4 scenarios). Defaults applied without explicit user answers: board.js-only ghost from fallingBlocks+lockedMap on redraw; at-rest ghost overlaps active piece; drawGhostCell ~0.28 alpha; hide ghost only when fallingBlocks is empty.
7 requirements, feature, scope bounded to board renderer only (no game-loop changes). Describe defaults recorded in assumptions. Lint in acceptance.

Ghost draw order, drawGhostCell opacity, and drawGhostLayer already exist; ghostBlocks is never populated. Checklist verifies those first, then implements downward simulation and per-redraw recompute in the board renderer only.
Ghost blocks populated via downward simulation (checkBlocksCollision) in updateGhostBlocks at each drawBoard; draw order and 0.28 alpha unchanged. board.js only; all subtasks checked.
Ghost simulation in board.js meets all requirements; lint passed; no blockers.
User accepted at ready_for_acceptance with explicit sync request for tetris-clone-frp ghost-piece-rendering. Approved for sync; integrate deferred.
